records.title: Average revenue per user trend
records.summary: Track blended ARPU by product (mobile, broadband, converged) and segment to identify revenue dilution or upsell opportunity.
records.metric_definition: Total service revenue divided by average subscriber base for the period.
records.methodology_note: Separate prepaid and postpaid ARPU; exclude equipment revenue.

records.title: Customer churn rate
records.summary: Measure monthly and annual gross churn by product line and channel to identify retention hotspots and trigger proactive saves.
records.metric_definition: Subscribers disconnecting in period divided by average subscriber base.

records.title: Network quality and service assurance
records.summary: Maintain transparent, measurable service quality thresholds for latency, throughput, and availability with automated breach alerting.

records.title: Customer data privacy and consent management
records.summary: Enforce granular consent controls and data minimization for subscriber data used in analytics and personalization.

records.title: 5G and convergence monetization
records.summary: Identify and sequence revenue opportunities from 5G network slicing, fixed-wireless access, and converged product bundles.

records.title: Digital-first acquisition and self-service
records.summary: Shift customer acquisition and servicing to low-cost digital channels while preserving NPS through AI-assisted support.

records.title: Combine billing, network quality, and interaction data for real-time churn intervention
records.summary: Prioritize use cases that fuse billing triggers, network experience degradation, and service interaction signals into a unified churn propensity view, enabling proactive retention before customers reach cancellation rather than reactive win-back.

records.title: Produce reusable subscriber segments consumable across marketing and network planning
records.summary: Prefer use cases that output shareable subscriber segments — value tiers, usage profiles, propensity scores — usable by marketing for targeting, retention for saves, and network for capacity planning rather than function-specific segmentations.
